description: Enhancement features for the partner onboarding system including DocuSign integration, bulk onboarding, email notifications, and document template editor

milestones.name: DocuSign Integration
milestones.description: Replace custom document signing with DocuSign for enterprise-grade compliance, legal validity, and audit trails
milestones.businessValue: Provides legally binding signatures accepted in all jurisdictions, reduces liability, and meets enterprise compliance requirements

features.name: DocuSign API Integration
features.description: Connect to DocuSign eSignature API for document sending and signing
acceptanceCriteria: DocuSign developer account configured with API credentials
OAuth 2.0 authentication flow implemented
API wrapper service created for DocuSign operations
Environment variables for API keys securely stored
Sandbox and production environment support

tasks.description: Set up DocuSign developer account and API keys
Create DocuSign client wrapper with OAuth flow
Implement token refresh and error handling

features.name: Envelope Creation & Sending
features.description: Create and send document envelopes to partners for signing
acceptanceCriteria: Create envelopes with multiple documents (Agreement, NDA, W9, etc.)
Set signing order for multiple signers if needed
Add signature, date, and initial tabs at correct positions
Support for custom email subject and body
Track envelope ID in database for status updates

tasks.description: Create envelope builder with document templates
Implement signature tab positioning for each document type
Store envelope ID and status in partnerDocuments table

features.name: DocuSign Webhook Handler
features.description: Receive and process DocuSign Connect webhook events for real-time status updates
acceptanceCriteria: Webhook endpoint to receive DocuSign Connect events
Verify webhook signatures using HMAC
Handle envelope status changes (sent, delivered, signed, completed, declined)
Update partner document status in database
Trigger onboarding automation when all docs signed

tasks.description: Create webhook endpoint with signature verification
Implement status change handlers for each event type

features.name: Signed Document Retrieval
features.description: Download and store signed documents from DocuSign
acceptanceCriteria: Retrieve signed PDF documents from completed envelopes
Store documents in secure cloud storage (Supabase/S3)
Generate secure download URLs for partners
Include certificate of completion
Audit trail document retrieval

tasks.description: Implement document download from DocuSign API
Upload signed documents to Supabase storage
Create secure download endpoint for partners
Store document URLs in partnerDocuments table

features.name: Embedded Signing Experience
features.description: Allow partners to sign documents within the app without leaving
acceptanceCriteria: Generate embedded signing URL for recipients
Display DocuSign signing ceremony in iframe/modal
Handle signing completion callback
Fallback to email signing if embedded fails
Mobile-responsive signing experience

features.name: Migration from Custom Signing
features.description: Migrate existing partners from custom signing to DocuSign
acceptanceCriteria: Feature flag to enable DocuSign vs custom signing
Existing signed documents remain valid
New partners use DocuSign by default
Admin can resend documents via DocuSign for unsigned partners
Gradual rollout plan documented

tasks.description: Update signing flow to check feature flag
Create admin tool to resend via DocuSign

milestones.name: Bulk Partner Onboarding
milestones.description: Enable onboarding multiple partners at once via CSV import with validation and batch processing
milestones.businessValue: Accelerates enterprise sales cycles where multiple locations need onboarding, reduces manual data entry

features.name: CSV Template Generator
features.description: Generate and download CSV templates for bulk import
acceptanceCriteria: Downloadable CSV template with all required fields
Template includes field descriptions and examples
Support for all business types and integration types
Excel-compatible format with proper encoding

tasks.description: Define CSV schema with all partner fields

features.name: CSV Upload & Validation
features.description: Upload and validate CSV files before processing
acceptanceCriteria: Drag-and-drop file upload interface
Client-side file size and type validation
Server-side CSV parsing with papaparse
Row-by-row validation with detailed error messages
Preview of parsed data before import
Highlight rows with validation errors
Required field validation (business name, email, type)
Email format and duplicate detection

tasks.description: Build file upload component with drag-drop
Create row validator with all field rules

features.name: Batch Processing Engine
features.description: Process validated CSV data and create partners in batch
acceptanceCriteria: Transaction-based batch insert for data integrity
Progress tracking during import
Error handling with partial success support
Generate import report with success/failure counts
Skip or update existing partners (configurable)
Rate limiting to prevent database overload

tasks.description: Create batch insert logic with transactions
Implement progress tracking with SSE or polling

features.name: Bulk Document Sending
features.description: Send onboarding documents to all imported partners at once
acceptanceCriteria: Option to send documents immediately after import
Queue-based sending to prevent API rate limits
Track document sending status per partner
Retry failed sends with exponential backoff
Email notification to admin when batch complete

tasks.description: Add retry logic with exponential backoff

features.name: Admin Bulk Import Dashboard
features.description: Admin interface for managing bulk imports
acceptanceCriteria: List of past bulk imports with status
View import details and results
Re-download original CSV and error report
Cancel in-progress imports
Import statistics and analytics

tasks.description: Create bulk import history list page
Build import detail view with results
Add download links for CSVs and reports

milestones.name: Email Notifications for Change Requests
milestones.description: Automated email notifications to keep partners informed about their change request status
milestones.businessValue: Improves partner experience, reduces support inquiries, and ensures timely communication

features.name: Email Template System
features.description: Create reusable email templates for change request notifications
acceptanceCriteria: HTML email templates with consistent branding
Templates for: submitted, in_review, approved, rejected, completed
Dynamic placeholders for partner name, request details, etc.
Plain text fallback for all templates
Preview capability in admin panel

tasks.description: Build rejected notification template with reason

features.name: Email Sending Service
features.description: Integrate with Resend for reliable email delivery
acceptanceCriteria: Resend API integration for transactional emails
Email queue for high-volume sending
Delivery status tracking
Retry logic for failed sends
Unsubscribe handling for marketing compliance

tasks.description: Set up Resend client with API key
Create email sender with template rendering
Implement email queue with database backing
tasks.notes: Basic queue via non-blocking sends; full database queue deferred
Basic tracking via Resend tags; full analytics in E3.5

features.name: Notification Triggers
features.description: Automatically trigger emails on change request status changes
acceptanceCriteria: Email sent when partner submits new request
Email sent when admin starts review
Email sent when request approved with details
Email sent when request rejected with reason
Email sent when changes applied to microsite
Admin notification for new pending requests

tasks.description: Add email trigger on request submission
Add email trigger on status change
Add admin notification for new requests

features.name: Notification Preferences
features.description: Allow partners to manage their email notification preferences
acceptanceCriteria: Partner settings page for notification preferences
Toggle for each notification type
Respect preferences when sending emails
One-click unsubscribe from emails
Admin can override for critical notifications

tasks.description: Build preferences UI in partner settings
Update email sender to check preferences

features.name: Email Analytics & Logging
features.description: Track email delivery and engagement metrics
acceptanceCriteria: Log all sent emails with status
Track open rates via pixel tracking
Track click rates for links
Admin dashboard for email analytics
Webhook handler for Resend events

milestones.name: Document Template Editor
milestones.description: Rich text editor for admins to create and modify document templates without developer involvement
milestones.businessValue: Enables legal/compliance team to update documents directly, reduces development bottlenecks, faster iteration on document content

features.name: Rich Text Editor Component
features.description: WYSIWYG editor for document content with legal document features
acceptanceCriteria: TipTap or Lexical-based rich text editor
Standard formatting (bold, italic, underline, lists)
Heading levels for document structure
Table support for clauses and terms
Link insertion for references
Image embedding for logos/headers
Clean HTML output for PDF generation
features.technicalNotes: Use TipTap with prosemirror for maximum flexibility

tasks.description: Add formatting toolbar with all options

features.name: Variable/Placeholder System
features.description: Insert dynamic placeholders that get replaced with partner data
acceptanceCriteria: Placeholder dropdown/autocomplete in editor
Support placeholders: {{BUSINESS_NAME}}, {{CONTACT_NAME}}, {{DATE}}, etc.
Visual indication of placeholders in editor
Preview with sample data
Validation that all placeholders are valid

tasks.description: Define all available placeholders with descriptions
Build TipTap extension for placeholder nodes

features.name: Template Version Control
features.description: Track changes to templates with version history
acceptanceCriteria: Automatic version increment on save
View history of all template versions
Compare versions side-by-side (diff view)
Restore previous versions
Track who made each change

tasks.description: Add diff view for version comparison

features.name: Template Preview & Testing
features.description: Preview templates with sample data before publishing
acceptanceCriteria: Live preview panel alongside editor
Sample partner data for placeholder replacement
PDF preview generation
Test signing flow with preview
Mobile preview mode

features.name: Template Management Dashboard
features.description: Admin interface for managing all document templates
acceptanceCriteria: List all templates with status (draft, active, archived)
Create new templates from scratch or duplicate existing
Edit existing templates with editor
Archive/restore templates
Set template as active version

tasks.description: Create template list page with filters
Build template edit page with editor

features.name: Signature Block Builder
features.description: Visual builder for signature sections in documents
acceptanceCriteria: Drag-and-drop signature block positioning
Multiple signature line support
Date and printed name fields
Witness/notary signature blocks
Custom label support

internal: E1 (optional - for bulk document sending via DocuSign)
